name: Cartier Silver Corporation
description: Cartier Silver Corporation is a Canadian-based exploration and development company focused on discovering and developing significant silver and gold resources. The company's primary projects include the Chorrillos Project and the Gringo Project in Bolivia, as well as the Big Easy Gold Project in Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada. Cartier Silver is committed to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and strategic acquisitions in prolific mining districts.
